access_token.description: Facebook Graph API access token, sent as a Bearer token. Used for every request; never logged.

base_url.description: Facebook Graph API base URL override for tests or proxies.

ad_account_id.description: Facebook ad account id, required for the account-scoped 'campaigns' and 'ads' streams. Must include the 'act_' prefix (e.g. act_1234567890); legacy accepted a bare numeric id and auto-prepended 'act_' when missing, but the engine's declarative path templating has no conditional-prefix primitive (see docs.md Known limits) -- provide the prefixed form directly.
